name: Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We provide a vendor contract management tool instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking contract renewals and terms with multiple vendors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking contract renewals and terms with multiple vendors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We provide a vendor contract management tool instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking through spreadsheets or basic document storage.

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We provide a vendor contract management tool instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
